# Service Design & Ecosystem Meta Journeys {#sec-service-design-meta-journeys}

::: {.chapterabstract}
Draft abstract: this chapter converts the canvas from Chapter 4 into stakeholder alignment journeys and system sequence diagrams (rendered code in @sec-app-mermaid).
:::

::: {.keywords}
service design &middot; meta-journey mapping &middot; stakeholder interaction &middot; API/data exchange
:::

## 5.1 Stakeholder Interaction Vectors
- Government, industry, and academia touchpoints; who owns which handoff.

## 5.2 API and Data Exchange Nodes
- Where the meta-journey requires machine-to-machine exchange versus human sign-off.

## 5.3 Sequence Modeling of Institutional Workflows
- Reading and adapting the Mermaid sequence diagram in @sec-app-mermaid (Section B.2) for a new institutional context.

::: {.callout-tip title="Bridge to Chapter 6"}
Chapter 6 stress-tests these journeys against real de-risking cases using the Safe and Sustainable by Design (SSbD) matrix.
:::
